text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and Narita Brian are having a joint
training session.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Man, goin' toe-to-toe with you always gets
my heart pumpin'!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Phew... You've got some serious pluck always
challenging me, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Still, I can't say I'm not impressed.
choice_data_list: Nice work out there, you two.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! But that was just a fraction of what Brian
and I are capable of.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's gotta be a way to make our battles even
more intense...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! We can try doing that thing I saw on
TV the other day!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What thing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was just this thing pro athletes do before a
match!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What was it called again? It's not curry roux... and
it's definitely not root beer...
choice_data_list: Are you thinking of the word "routine?"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's it, Teach! Phew, good save there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Do you have a routine you stick to, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've never given it much thought, but... I guess I
do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Can't say if this counts, but I like to clear my mind
first before I start training or racing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that sounds cool! You've gotta teach me
your tricks!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Think of this as a way to spice up our duels. What
do you say, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm only doing this once, so pay attention. And if
you're serious about this, we'll need a quiet spot
to concentrate.

And so, we trek to a mountain stream to learn the
secrets of clearing one's mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... I need to focus! Think... you're in a race,
and everything is on the line!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're thinking out loud, Ama. You just gotta try
to calm your mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gah! My head's about to burst!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...So much for that.
choice_data_list: How about we try a different routine?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
G-good suggestion. What do you think would suit
me, Teach?
choice_data_list: Pump yourself up with a huge yell.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yellin' is kinda my forte. Okay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaargh! Let's get this battle staaarteeed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm feelin' it! All right, this's gonna be my
new routine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. You're gonna do that before every match?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, why not? You'd better look forward to our
next race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, all this concentrating and yelling's got
my stomach rumblin'.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's head back to the academy for some lunch.
Don't worry, Brian, I've made food for you too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Are there any vegetables in this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I made sure everything will taste
good even with your picky tastes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I'll have some, then.

Their ambiguous relationship makes it hard to
know if they're good friends or bitter rivals, but I
have a good lunch with the two of them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? How will that help me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Books, eh? That's a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who said pro athletes tend to
have their own routines, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I think your trainer's suggesting you look for
books that talk about that stuff and read them
for reference.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I get it now! Let's see what the library has,
then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... Some like to strike a signature pose,
others like to touch their uniform...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm seeing a lot of ideas, but I dunno what I
should do!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Y'know, if you studied this hard for tests, you
wouldn't be borderline failing them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's none of your business! And you're the
last person I wanna hear that from.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You never study either, so how come you always
pass?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cause I at least do the bare minimum. I'd never
hear the end of it from Sis or the student council
if I bombed my tests.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't you dare ruin our next match by flunking
your way into remedial classes, Ama.

I witness yet another side of their rivalry as the
two bicker over their grades...
